---
title: "Nathan Muncy, Ph.D."
subtitle: "Assistant Research Professor | Cognitive Neuroscience"
image: media/muncy_head.png
# author:
#   name: "Nathan Muncy"
#   email: "nmuncy@nd.edu"
about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: jolla
  image-width: 15em
  # links:
  #     - icon: email
  #       text: email
  #       href: nmuncy@nd.edu
  #   - icon: github
  #     text: Github
  #     href: https://github.com/nmuncy
    # - icon: linkedin
    #   text: LinkedIn
    #   href: https://linkedin.com
---

## About

I use structural, functional, and diffusion MRI methods to study topics ranging from memory to traumatic brain injury. I am also interested in the application of diverse statistical techniques to cognitive neuroscientific questions.


## Contact
__Email__\
nmuncy at nd dot edu

__Address__\
E308 Corbett Family Hall\
University of Notre Dame\
South Bend, IN 46556


<!-- ## Education

* Postdoctoral Fellow | Duke University, Durham NC | 2022 - 2024
* Postdoctoral Fellow | Florida International University, Miami FL | 2020 - 2022
* Ph.D. Cognitive Neuroscience | Brigham Young University, Provo UT | 2016 - 2020
* M.Sc. Neuroscience | Brigham Young University, Provo UT | 2014 - 2016
* B.Sc. Psychology | Brigham Young University-Idaho, Rexburg ID | 2009 - 2013 -->

<!-- ## Experience

Workplace \| Job title \| April 20XX - present -->
